metadata.title: Duane Syndrome - Global Information & Community Portal
metadata.description: Comprehensive resource for Duane Syndrome patients, parents, and friends. Medical information, specialist directory, community support, and interactive tools.

hero.title: You're Not Alone
hero.subtitle: The global community for Duane Syndrome — connect, learn, and thrive.
hero.description: Duane Syndrome is a rare eye movement condition affecting about 1 in 1,000 people. Whether you have it, love someone who does, or want to understand it — you're in the right place.

persona.title: I am...
persona.patientDesc: Tips, community, and tools for living your best life
persona.parentDesc: Guidance, specialists, and support for your child
persona.friend: A friend, family member, or educator
persona.friendDesc: Understand Duane Syndrome and how to be supportive

common.disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice.

footer.tagline: Empowering the Duane Syndrome community worldwide
footer.aboutText: A free, open-source resource built by and for the Duane Syndrome community.
